failure_summary: No critical pre-outcome failure. Postmortem generated as a preventive trace.
likely_causes: Sample size is small; confidence may be overstated.
Market/news context is incomplete and should be stabilized before high-conviction automation.

tickets.hypothesis: Current run size is insufficient for stable inference.
tickets.requested_change: Attach sample-size penalty to planner confidence and show warning banner.
tickets.title: Strengthen small-sample safeguards

tickets.hypothesis: Missing or unstable regime/news overlay can cause false positives in weak markets.
tickets.requested_change: Raise macro/news data fetch reliability and reduce fallback/no-context frequency.
tickets.title: Stabilize live market context handoff
